chapter_title: Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
text:
(a) The owner of a sign removed by the department under Section 392.033 (Removal and Disposal of Illegal Sign) is liable to the department for removal costs.

(b) Removal costs received by the department under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 392. Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
##### § 392.035 — Removal Costs

(a) The owner of a sign removed by the department under Section 392.033 (Removal and Disposal of Illegal Sign) is liable to the department for removal costs.

(b) Removal costs received by the department under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The owner of a sign removed by the department under Section 392.033 (Removal and Disposal of Illegal Sign) is liable to the department for removal costs.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Removal costs received by the department under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund.
